name: Loan/EMI Collection Call QC
scoring: Start at 100. For each parameter the agent FAILS, deduct that parameter's full weightage. The final score is 100 minus all deductions.

parameters.name: Opening script
parameters.fail_if: Incorrect greeting, delay in opening, or no opening script followed.

parameters.name: Self and company introduction / Identification
parameters.fail_if: Agent name is missing, or agent failed to confirm the customer's name.

parameters.name: Tape disclosure
parameters.fail_if: Call-recording disclosure script was not informed during the call.

parameters.name: Permission for conversation
parameters.fail_if: Executive failed to seek the customer's 2-minute permission to talk.

parameters.name: Loan Details
parameters.fail_if: Loan amount, due date, or EMI details were missed in the call.

parameters.name: Payment pitch
parameters.fail_if: Executive failed to pitch the payment on the call.

parameters.name: Payment History
parameters.fail_if: Executive failed to check the customer's previous payment history / over-due / previous loan payment timing.

parameters.name: Urgency creation
parameters.fail_if: Failed to convince the customer to pay or to explain the benefits / urgency of paying.

parameters.name: Objection handling
parameters.fail_if: Agent failed to handle the customer's objections (as per customer VOC).

parameters.name: Effective Communication
parameters.fail_if: Poor soft skills: bad rate of speech / tone, weak active listening, interruptions, filler/fumbling, jargon, or lack of empathy.

parameters.name: Hold / Dead air / IVR
parameters.fail_if: Executive failed to use HOLD protocol, or there was too much quiet/dead air (>15s, or repeated >10s gaps).

parameters.name: Language Transfer / Call disconnection script
parameters.fail_if: Agent failed to follow the transfer script or the disconnection script.

parameters.name: Professional Behaviour
parameters.fail_if: Agent was rude, unprofessional, sarcastic, or abusive.

parameters.name: Remarks
parameters.fail_if: Failed to update the remark. (Judge ONLY from transcript evidence; if not observable in audio, do not fail.)

parameters.name: Disposition
parameters.fail_if: Failed to update disposition or set a wrong disposition. (Judge ONLY from transcript evidence; if not observable in audio, do not fail.)

parameters.name: Alternative number / Further assistance / Closing script
parameters.fail_if: Failed to ask for an alternative number, or failed to use the further-assistance and closing script.
